_description: Tailscale / VPN overrides — Mac Mini Ollama provider. Merge the 'ollama-mac-mini' block into your base models.json providers object.
_notes: In most Tailscale setups http://mac-mini:11434 works everywhere. Use this file only if MagicDNS short names don't resolve outside the tailnet. Replace tail12345 with your actual tailnet name from tailscale status.
